steps.title: Use the tradition contrast
steps.content: The sentence says the artisans use techniques passed down since the thirteenth century, but they do not strictly observe every tradition. That contrast works if the blank says they generally follow the traditional techniques while making some modern adjustments.

steps.title: Reject innovation-first meanings
steps.content: Choice A makes experimentation the main action, not general respect for tradition. Choice C says they improve on the techniques, which is stronger than the evidence. Choice D means struggle with, which the sentence does not suggest. The answer is B.
